assets.alt: Miron biophotonic violet glass jar held to the light — the violet glass filters the light spectrum that degrades actives
Clear, green, brown, black and Miron violet glass compared — violet glass blocks the harmful visible light that degrades contents while letting beneficial UV and infrared through
Herbs kept in Miron violet glass stay fresh and green while those in clear glass fade — the violet glass preserves potency

story: The protective power of violet glass traces back to Ancient Egypt, where precious essences and natural healing preparations were kept in violet glass vessels — Cleopatra is reputed to have kept the aloe vera she rubbed on her skin each day in violet glass jars.
In Eastern tradition, the color violet represents the harmony of the universe: blue and red, Yin and Yang. Yin — the stored energy that preserves matter; Yang — solar energy, outgoing and free.
